Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n## Quick PK status note\n- Current dosing config is complete for all three compassionate-use patients.\n- Parameters appear internally consistent and patient notes are overall stable/positive.\n- CU-003 warrants closer routine follow-up because this is a new enrollment and the schedule is q2w.\n- This review is based on the dosing config only; it does **not** confirm live runtime/model-monitoring health." , recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing info and put together a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

**Compassionate-use dosing summary**
- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`
- **Last updated:** 2026-03-28

| Patient | Weight | Dose | Calculated dose | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|
| CU-001 | 12.4 kg | 0.15 mg/kg | 1.86 mg | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 mL/min |
| CU-002 | 9.1 kg | 0.12 mg/kg | 1.09 mg | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 mL/min |
| CU-003 | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | 2.83 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

**Clinical notes**
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan.
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving.
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27.

**PK model status**
- Based on the dosing config, everything looks **current and internally consistent**.
- I don’t see missing parameters or obvious dosing inconsistencies in this file.
- That said, this only confirms the **configured dosing inputs** — it does **not** verify live PK model runtime/monitoring health.
- From a patient-management standpoint, **CU-003** is the one I’d watch most closely since they’re newly enrolled and on **q2w** dosing.

If you want, I can also format this into a short email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
